gist.headline: Python meets Pollen
gist.blurb: A new Python SDK has sprouted in the greenhouse. Now your scripts can buzz the API directly without the boilerplate.
gist.summary: Added PollinationAI-SDK to the project directory, providing a dedicated Python wrapper for easier API integration.
gist.impact: Python developers can now integrate Pollinations features using native objects instead of raw HTTP requests.
gist.visual_concept: A friendly meeting between the Pollinations bee and a cute pixel-art snake (representing Python). The snake is helpful, perhaps holding a cable or code block, symbolizing the new SDK connection.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot high-fiving a cute friendly green pixel snake in a digital garden. The snake is coiled around a lime green (#ecf874) glowing API terminal. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'PYTHON SDK'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
